STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-23-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA ALBERTO , LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MADRIGAL, ARLENIA D SOZA $1,450.43 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,555.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
